title: saxifraga callosa subsp. australis
intro: Saxifraga callosa subsp. australis is a rare and lesser-known sub-species of the saxifraga callosa plant, a type of alpine rock saxifrage that is native to New Zealand. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Saxifraga callosa subsp. australis include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe wounds, and combat infections, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Saxifraga callosa subsp. australis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
